sections.paragraph:
Original: נשׁה

Transliteration: nâshâh

Phonetic: naw-shaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to lend, be a creditor
    1. (Qal)
      1. to lend
      2. creditor (participle) (substantive)
    2. (Hiphil) to lend

Origin: a primitive root [rather identical with H5382, in the sense of H5378]

TWOT entry: 1427

Part(s) of speech: Verb
